CVE-2024-27758.title: In RPyC before 6.0.0, when a server exposes a method that calls t ...
CVE-2024-27758.description: In RPyC before 6.0.0, when a server exposes a method that calls the attribute named __array__ for a client-provided netref (e.g., np.array(client_netref)), a remote attacker can craft a class that results in remote code execution.
